tau_object: tau_vs_Tp.csv (per-Tp rows; includes tau_effective_seconds and per-method columns)
input_object: TRACK_B consolidation: Tp tw Dip_depth FM_abs source_run; fits Dip_depth vs tw per Tp
input_artifact: aging_observable_dataset.csv (default path under results/aging/runs/... or override AGING_OBSERVABLE_DATASET_PATH)
tau_method: logistic half stretched_exp half_range components; buildConsensusTau sets tau_effective_seconds = 10^median(log10 of trusted positive component taus)
notes: Logical name tau_Dip_depth_curvefit maps to this script output family; F7G WF_TAU_DIP_CURVEFIT

tau_object: tau_FM_vs_Tp.csv (per-Tp rows; includes tau_effective_seconds and per-method columns)
input_object: Same consolidation schema; fits FM_abs vs tw per Tp; also reads prior dip tau FM collapse metrics per cfg
input_artifact: aging_observable_dataset.csv plus dip tau_vs_Tp.csv and failed dip-clock metrics file (cfg defaults)
tau_method: same component methods; buildEffectiveFmTau uses half_range_seconds only when half_range ok else consensus median log like Dip
notes: Logical name tau_FM_abs_curvefit maps to this script output family; WF_TAU_FM_CURVEFIT; differs from Dip when half_range_primary path applies
